title: There must be a better way ...
content:
มันต้องมีวิธีเขียนสูตรที่ดีกว่านี้สิ -"-
There must be a better way to write this formula.

[plain]
=IF([@[not_in]] <> 1,
  \ IF(AND([@[rem'@9]] = "", [@[cur'@9]] = 0), 0,
  \ IF([@[rem'@9]] = [@[cur'@9]], 0, [@[cur'@9]] - [@[rem'@9]])),
  \ IF(AND([@[rem'@9]] = "", [@[cur'@9]] = 0), 0, [@[cur'@9]] - [@[rem'@9]]))
[/plain]

อ่านเอง ปวดหัวเอง
This thing is giving me a headache.
